violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the kitchen are slippery and should be cleaned more frequently.
CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted being stored above food not to be further cooked. Observed whole muscle beef stored above vegetables in the drawer style cooler below the char broiler.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Hand washing lavatory in kitchen at the end of the cook line noted blocked with portable cooler and boxes.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution. Quat spray bottles in expo station and in bar tested at 0 PPM.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Cases of to-go containers noted being stored on the floor in the expo area.
